# Files and its purpose described below.

## 

Prompts.txt --> this file contains all the prompts used in completing the tasks. the prompt also contins the generated output file names.

## generated Files for each tasks

Task 1:
Email Summary\_Task1.docx --> this doc contains the email summary,
Supply Chain Issues Review\_Task1.docx --> this doc contains the report for Task 1

Task 2:
Meeting Invite\_Task2.png --> Meeting invite screenshot
Meeting summary and Action Plan\_Task2.docx --> this doc contains the meeting summary and action plan based on the provided meeting transcript

Task 3:
Supply Chain Report Insight\_Task3.xlsx --> this sheet contains the insights generated from "Supply Chain Report.xlsx."
Supply Chain Issue Analysis Report\_Task3.docx --> this is the Supply Chain Issue Analysis Report

Task 4:
Supply Chain Issue Compliance Report\_Task4.pptx --> this is the final presentation for task 4
